prompt: A dark fantasy anime light-novel cover in a vertical composition, painted with detailed dramatic brushwork and moody cinematic lighting. Show three young women posed in a triangular arrangement against a ruined medieval city engulfed in flames at night, with smoke, embers, collapsed timber buildings, and a large stone castle on a rocky hill in the upper background. In the foreground center, place a beautiful young woman with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="powder blue"} hair, wearing an off-shoulder blue corset dress with white frilled sleeves and lace-up bodice, one hand lightly gripping her chest, her expression serious and vulnerable. Behind her on the left, place a tall woman with silver-white hair tied in a high ponytail and a white headscarf, wearing a modest black dress with a high collar and front fastenings, standing in profile with a stern, unreadable presence. Behind her on the right, place a blonde girl with twin braids under a brown hooded cloak, pale blue-green eyes, holding a black book with a star-like emblem on the cover close to her chest, looking sideways with a guarded expression. Use layered character overlap, strong contrast, and slightly desaturated colors except for warm firelight and deep reds. Add large vertical Japanese title typography along the left side in distressed calligraphic style: 「異世界辺境伯領」 in black and dark red, plus two smaller vertical text blocks near the lower left reading 「現代の倫理観を捨て」 and 「権力と暴力で泥臭く生き延びます」. Add a decorative compass-like emblem near the lower left and a large bold vertical subtitle 「転生」 at the bottom left. Ornate corner filigree, gritty light-novel cover design, intense isekai war atmosphere, high detail, premium illustrated novel cover.
translatedPrompt: 一张竖构图的暗黑奇幻动漫轻小说封面，采用细腻且富有戏剧性的笔触绘制，营造出忧郁的电影感光影。画面展示了三位年轻女性呈三角形排列，背景是夜晚被火焰吞噬的中世纪废墟城市，伴有烟雾、余烬、倒塌的木质建筑，远景上方是一座矗立在岩石山丘上的巨大石堡。画面前景中央是一位美丽的年轻女性，留着一头飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="粉蓝色"} 长发，身穿露肩蓝色束腰连衣裙，配有白色荷叶边袖子和系带胸衣，一只手轻抚胸口，表情严肃而脆弱。她左后方是一位高挑女性，留着扎成高马尾的银白色长发，戴着白色头巾，身穿领口较高且有前襟系扣的朴素黑裙，侧身站立，神情严峻，令人捉摸不透。她右后方是一位金发少女，戴着棕色连帽斗篷，扎着双麻花辫，有着淡蓝绿色的双眸，怀抱一本封面上印有星形徽章的黑色书籍，侧目而视，神情警惕。画面采用层叠的人物布局，对比强烈，色彩略显低饱和，仅保留温暖的火光和深红色。在左侧添加醒目的竖排日文标题，采用做旧的书法风格：黑红色的「異世界辺境伯領」；左下方另有两个较小的竖排文本块，分别为「現代の倫理観を捨て」和「権力と暴力で泥臭く生き延びます」。左下方添加一个装饰性的罗盘状徽章，底部左侧添加一个醒目的大字竖排副标题「転生」。装饰性边角花纹，粗砺的轻小说封面设计，浓厚的异世界战争氛围，高细节，优质插画小说封面。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗黑奇幻异世界轻小说封面：此提示词可生成一张极具戏剧性的动漫风格暗黑奇幻轻小说封面，包含三位女主角、燃烧的中世纪废墟，以及用于书籍封面或宣传图的醒目竖排日文标题。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求可读；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
